jobs.title: AI Community Engineer
jobs.content: <h3 data-start="545" data-end="563">About the Role</h3><p>We&rsquo;re looking for someone who can&#39;t stop building with AI and can&#39;t stop showing people what they&rsquo;ve built. You&rsquo;ll partner with CircleCI&rsquo;s product team on the CircleCI Cloud pipeline runner and CircleCI Insights analytics product to develop hands-on AI-powered DevEx demos for the broader developer community.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Build the CircleCI Server platform that thousands of regulated engineering teams run their CI on &mdash; the on-prem orchestrator, the autoscaling executor pool, and the Orbs registry indexer that the SRE team monitors every day. CircleCI&rsquo;s mission depends on this platform staying reliable across every customer-controlled cluster.</p>
